title: 美商务部要求Anthropic禁止出口Fable 5和Mythos 5
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Interesting: The US Commerce Secretary reportedly told Anthropic it needs government permission to export Fable 5 and Mythos 5 anywhere in the world.
Even to “any foreign national regardless of location.”
"Lutnick threatened Anthropic with criminal and civil penalties if it ding to a copy of the directive obtained by Bloomberg News."
Anthropic’s response: disable both models for all users.
Two points to consider:
1) Even friendly nations are excluded from the most significant models. SOTA is increasingly becoming a strategic weapon, kept secret.
2) As a result, AI is now being shifted away from private companies and directly into government control.
Bloomberg
@business
6h
Read the full text of the letter from US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei. bloomberg.com/news/articles/…
7:54 PM · Jun 16, 2026 75.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: 美商务部要求Anthropic禁止出口Fable 5和Mythos 5
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 美国商务部长Howard Lutnick告知Anthropic，出口其最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5至全球任何地方均需政府许可，甚至禁止向任何国籍的海外人士提供。Lutnick在信件中威胁，若不遵守将面临刑事和民事处罚。Anthropic回应：禁用这两个模型。推文作者指出，连友好国家也被排除在SOTA模型之外，AI正从私人公司转向政府控制。该信件全文由Bloomberg公开。

key_excerpts.text: 美国商务部长Howard Lutnick告知Anthropic，出口其最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5至全球任何地方均需政府许可，甚至禁止向任何国籍的海外人士提供。Lutnick在信件中威胁，若不遵守将面临刑事和民事处罚。Anthropic回应：禁用这两个模型。推文作者指出，连友好国家也被排除在SOTA模型之外，AI正从私人公司转向政府控制。该信件全文由Bloomberg公开。
